productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Naughty Pink Top
description: Style NoteMade for naughty little girls, this top from little miss belongs in your wardrobe if you know how to get your way! Team it with jeans, shorts or capris and pretend to be the angel you are!Product DetailsPink top with a round neck, has cap sleeves with pleats, has a frill at the hem with graphic print and glitter on the front and backMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
